ogTitle: Erskine Park vs Erudgere: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Erskine Park and Erudgere.
heading: Erskine Park vs Erudgere — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Erskine Park, New South Wales and Erudgere, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erskine Park has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Erudgere (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Erskine Park or Erudgere safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Erskine Park has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Erudgere scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Erskine Park scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Erudgere scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Erskine Park or Erudgere?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erskine Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
